sections.name: Opportunities & Events
sections.angle: BETA. Events & opportunities worth showing up to / applying to, in THREE tiers: (1) NATIONAL India events that matter; (2) LOCAL — Jaipur + Delhi/NCR + nearby (0-4 great ones); (3) GLOBAL — only the creamiest, must-attend. Plus fellowships/cohorts/hackathons. Includes OFFLINE events (summits, expos, exhibitions, seminars, festivals, sport). Examples: G7 in India, Olympics, India Art Fair, Jaipur Literature Festival. Only list items with a concrete date AND a working link; label clearly as beta.
